_comment: Config for sync-rankings.py. Copy to sync-rankings.config.json and edit. The live file is gitignored.
_examples_to_pattern_after: Each source maps one CSV → one data/rankings/{analyst}-{format}.json file.
Analyst names are entirely your choice — they become the tab labels on rankings.html.
Format keys MUST be one of: 'sf' | 'sf-tep' | '1qb' | '1qb-tep' (matches the page's format toggle).
